_meta.note: Two-column layout. Left column = gallery + thumbs + below-the-fold accordions. Right column (sticky-ish) = title + price + monthly + contact form.

page_layout.note: Sandbox's BDP renders at ~1400px content (65px wider per existing FIDELITY.md row). Acceptable 🟡 per SCOPE.md.

breadcrumb._real_text: Home / Boats For Sale / Power / Center Console / Pioneer

gallery_and_thumbs.note: Container holds main image + thumbnail strip + 'View 22 Photos' overlay button. 890px wide, 727px tall. Thumbnail strip ~175×116 per FIDELITY.md row 'Thumbnail strip'.

monthly_estimate.note: Sits directly to the right of main_price (x=1132 = price.x + price.w + ~20px gap). Real BT probably uses a flex row to hold both.

contact_form_right_rail.note: Sits below the title/price block in the right rail. 334px wide × 260px tall. Includes Name, Email, Phone, Message fields + submit button.

below_fold_accordions._layout: Stacked H3 accordion sections in the left column under the gallery: Description, Measurements, Propulsion, More Details, Location, Boat Loan Calculator preview.
_known_matches_in_fidelity_md: Measurements subsection uses H4 (Dimensions / Weights / Tanks)
Real BT may use H4 for More Details + Location headers; sandbox uses H3 — documented 🟡 gap
Lead form inputs 4px radius, outline button 2px (v=55)
_open_followups: Probe show-phone reveal flow (real BT uses 'Show phone' link that swaps to digits)
Probe sticky title bar that appears on scroll past gallery (likely 320px threshold per base.html JS)
Probe Similar Boats card rail (likely matches SRP listing card)
Capture POST /boat/<slug>/contact request shape (form fields, content-type)
Measure BDP content width gap: real 1319 vs sandbox 1400 (65-81px wider — accept or fix)
_capture_methodology: Open any /boat/<slug>/ at 1512px, scroll to make each section visible, probe per element. The right rail is the canonical anchor: x=1039–1389 holds title + price + contact form. Left column 890px wide holds gallery + below-fold accordions.
